title: Sugar-Free Tostadas
description: A savory and tender crowd-pleasing Peruvian dish featuring sugar-free-friendly tortillas cooked in a simmering sauce.
instructions: Mix tomato puree, ginger paste, cilantro leaves, lime juice, chili powder, cumin powder, and salt together in a large bowl.
Cut tortilla into triangles or squares. Arrange on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Spread mixture evenly over each tortilla, ensuring it covers the whole surface. Press slightly to adhere ingredients to tortillas.
Bake for 8-10 minutes until edges are golden brown and filling is heated through.
Serve warm as a refreshing snack or side dish.
